generated.findings: The cardiomediastinal silhouette and pulmonary vasculature are within normal limits. There is no pneumothorax or pleural effusion. There are no focal areas of consolidation. Prominent left epicardial fat is noted.

generated.recommendation: Follow-up radiograph to assess stability may be of benefit
